name: Royal Orchid Hotels Limited
summary: Royal Orchid Hotels Limited operates and manages hotels and resorts in India. The company also provides restaurants and mobile food services. It operates 58 hotels and resorts with approximately 3,920 guest rooms, as well as 110 restaurants and bars in 39 cities. The company was formerly known as Universal Resorts Limited and changed its name to Royal Orchid Hotels Limited in 1997. Royal Orchid Hotels Limited was founded in 1973 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
